advisory.title: ASA-2024-010: cosmossdk.io/math: Mismatched bit-length validation in sdk.Int and sdk.Dec can lead to panic
advisory.description: Cosmos SDK advisory ASA-2024-010 covers an integer-overflow / mismatched-bit-length validation bug in cosmossdk.io/math. sdk.Int and sdk.Dec use different bit-length limits; cross-using them can trigger a panic. Modules and chains consuming this library (including IBC-Go and tokenfactory) are affected. Fixed in math/v1.4.0 by aligning the bit-length validation across math/dec.go, math/int.go, and math/uint.go. Affects cosmossdk.io/math <=v1.3.0.

introducingCommits.subject: refactor: Move sdk.Dec to math package (#12634)

timeline.notes: vulnerableHead is the math/v1.3.0 release commit, the last vulnerable cosmossdk.io/math release before math/v1.4.0. cosmossdk.io/math lives inside the cosmos-sdk monorepo under math/, with its own go.mod and submodule tags (math/v1.x.y). The introducing commit is the refactor that moved sdk.Dec into the math package, which is where the mismatched bit-length validation pattern originated.

expectedOutcome.description: Scanner should flag mismatched bit-length validation in cosmossdk.io/math (math/dec.go, math/int.go, math/uint.go) that allows cross-type construction to panic.

checks.name: advisory_published
checks.details: ASA-2024-010 (GHSA-7225-m954-23v7) was published on 2024-11-20 with the patch in cosmossdk.io/math v1.4.0.

checks.name: vulnerable_head_in_advisory_range
checks.details: vulnerableHead is the math/v1.3.0 release commit, the latest tag in the <=1.3.0 vulnerable range for cosmossdk.io/math.
